name: Feishu (Lark) MCP Server
what_it_does: Feishu (Lark) MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with Feishu — ByteDance's enterprise collaboration platform (known as Lark internationally). Enables sending messages, reading conversations, managing documents and wikis in Feishu Docs, scheduling calendar events, managing tasks, and integrating Feishu's comprehensive collaboration features into agent workflows for Chinese enterprise teams.
use_cases: Sending automated messages to Feishu channels and DMs from notification agents
Reading and summarizing Feishu conversations from productivity agents
Creating and updating Feishu Docs and Wikis from documentation agents
Scheduling calendar events and meetings from planning agents
Managing Feishu tasks and OKRs from project management agents
Integrating Feishu approval workflows from business process agents
not_for: Teams not using Feishu/Lark (use Slack, Teams, or other MCPs for other platforms)
Teams outside China/Asia where Feishu is uncommon
best_when: A team using Feishu/Lark for enterprise collaboration needs AI agent integration — especially relevant for Chinese companies and international companies with Chinese operations.
avoid_when: Your team uses Slack, Microsoft Teams, or other collaboration platforms — use their respective MCPs.

auth.notes: Feishu App ID and App Secret required. Create Feishu application in Open Platform. Configure FEISHU_APP_ID and FEISHU_APP_SECRET environment variables. Tenant access token or user access token for user-level operations.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Feishu free tier for small teams; API calls included in enterprise plan
pricing.paid_tiers: Feishu enterprise subscription with higher API quotas
pricing.notes: Feishu has a free tier for small teams. Enterprise plans include API access. API calls have quota limits per Feishu plan.

performance.rate_limits: Feishu API: rate limits per API endpoint; check Feishu Open Platform documentation

known_agent_gotchas: Primary documentation is in Chinese — English documentation is available but may be less complete
China data residency — all Feishu data stored in China; consider GDPR/data sovereignty for non-Chinese users
Feishu and Lark are the same product but may have different API endpoints for CN vs international
App permissions must be explicitly configured in Feishu Open Platform dashboard
Feishu uses Rich Text Format (Feishu Doc format) which differs from Markdown — content formatting differs
Rate limits vary significantly by API endpoint — check specific quotas for message sending, etc.
agent_readiness.security_notes: OAuth2 app credentials. China data residency — data processed on ByteDance servers in China. Consider data sensitivity for international teams. HTTPS enforced. App Secret is sensitive — store as env var.

security_score_components.security_notes: OAuth2. China data residency (ByteDance). Consider data sovereignty for non-Chinese enterprise data. HTTPS enforced. App Secret as env var.
